name: Chinese Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Tamari soy sauce, low sodium
1 bunch green onions, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 2 cups hot water over the mushrooms in a bowl; soak for 15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, put 10 cups water in a large soup pot. Add Tamari, sherry, ginger, and garlic. Bring to a boil.
3. Add onion wedges. Reduce heat.
4. Squeeze excess liquid from the mushrooms, reserving the liquid. Add 1 1/2 cups of this liquid to the hot broth.
5. Chop mushrooms, discarding tough stems, and add to the broth. Add remaining ingredients, except for the noodles.
6. Simmer over low heat for 15 minutes, then add noodles and cook an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
HELPFUL HINTS: This will make a meal for four people, or a first course, with other Chinese food, for eight people.
